channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Phillip Island weather forecast: Access blocked for crawler bots
item.description: The article discusses an error message encountered when attempting to access a news story about Phillip Island weather. News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic, whic...

item.title: NEET UG 2026 Results: State-wise Toppers and Key Statistics Revealed
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the results of the NEET UG 2026 exam, marking a significant milestone in the medical admissions process. Over 11.21 lakh candidates qualified for undergr...

item.title: Tinubu officially names Shettima as 2027 vice-presidential candidate
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has officially confirmed Kashim Shettima as his running mate for the 2027 presidential election through a formal certificate presentation. The event, shared by Tinubu's social me...

item.title: Government bans high-caffeine energy drinks for under-16s in England from April
item.description: The UK government has announced a ban on high-caffeine energy drinks for children under 16 in England, effective from April 2027. The regulation prohibits the sale of drinks containing more than 150mg...

item.title: Supreme Court says third language should begin earlier than Class IX to avoid burden on board exam students
item.description: The Supreme Court observed that introducing a third language only from Class IX could place an unnecessary academic burden on students who are already preparing for their board examinations. The remar...

item.title: Respected Community Leader Mary Amaechi Dies at 89
item.description: The family of former Rivers State Governor and African Democratic Congress (ADC) vice-presidential candidate Rotimi Amaechi announced the peaceful passing of his mother, Mary Amaechi, at the age of 89...

item.title: Aldi settles underpayment claims with $50 million payout
item.description: The article reports that Aldi, the German supermarket chain, has agreed to pay over $50 million to workers who were underpaid during their employment. The settlement comes after investigations reveale...

item.title: Vancouver Whitecaps vs. Chicago Fire match postponed over hazardous air quality
item.description: The Vancouver Whitecaps FC's scheduled match against the Chicago Fire at Soldier Field has been rescheduled for Tuesday, October 6, due to hazardous wildfire smoke affecting air quality in the region....

item.title: Metrorail commuter harassed by security guards for not greeting on Cape Town train

item.title: Andy Serkis Addresses Criticism Over All-White Cast of New 'Lord of the Rings' Film
item.description: The upcoming standalone film 'The Hunt for Gollum,' part of the 'Lord of the Rings' franchise, has faced backlash over its all-white cast. Director Andy Serkis acknowledged Tolkien's Norse influences ...

item.title: Bea Alonzo and Vincent Co's Wedding: A Look at the Tarot Vlog That Gained Attention

item.title: White House aide faces leave after betting on Trump's speeches
item.description: Gabriel Perez, a long-time technical assistant to Donald Trump, has been placed on unpaid administrative leave after allegations he bet over $US100,000 on prediction markets based on Trump's speeches....

item.title: Laura Wolvaardt and Aiden Markram dominate CSA Awards 2026

item.title: Critique of U.S. Defense Spending and the Military-Industrial Complex
